decisions.evidence_source_review_method: Authoritative pre-semantic records were rebuilt from accepted submissions with retired-submission overrides, then the complete semantic-correction and correction-supersession journals were replayed. The relation-specific findings in this shard record every surviving semantic exception found by that review.
